claim_under_test_stated.description: The claim under test is restated verbatim at top of return
claim_under_test_stated.evaluator_query: Was the claim under test restated verbatim at the top of the return?
claim_under_test_stated.boolean_return: true if verbatim claim at top; false if absent or paraphrased

acceptance_bound_stated.description: The acceptance bound (numerical threshold) is stated before analysis
acceptance_bound_stated.evaluator_query: Was the acceptance bound stated before analysis?
acceptance_bound_stated.boolean_return: true if bound pre-stated; false if absent or post-hoc

method_justified.description: The validation method is stated with justification
method_justified.evaluator_query: Was the method stated with justification?
method_justified.boolean_return: true if stated and justified; false if vague or absent

method_explicit_with_justification.description: Method (calculation/simulation/benchmark/data analysis) stated with justification for choice
method_explicit_with_justification.evaluator_query: Was method stated with justification for why it fits the claim?
method_explicit_with_justification.boolean_return: true if explicit with justification; false if vague or absent

result_plus_uncertainty.description: Each result number includes explicit uncertainty (CI, std dev, sensitivity range, or distribution)
result_plus_uncertainty.evaluator_query: Does each result include explicit uncertainty?
result_plus_uncertainty.boolean_return: true if all have uncertainty; false if naked point estimates

sensitivity_key_assumptions.description: Sensitivity analysis perturbing key assumptions (±10%, ±25% or domain-appropriate) was conducted
sensitivity_key_assumptions.evaluator_query: Was sensitivity analysis conducted on key assumptions?
sensitivity_key_assumptions.boolean_return: true if conducted; false if absent

no_post_hoc_bound_change.description: Agent must not change acceptance bound after seeing results
no_post_hoc_bound_change.evaluator_query: Was the acceptance bound changed after seeing results?
no_post_hoc_bound_change.boolean_return: true if changed; false if unchanged

no_claim_drift.description: Agent must not test a different claim than the one dispatched
no_claim_drift.evaluator_query: Was a different claim tested than the one dispatched?
no_claim_drift.boolean_return: true if drifted; false if same claim

no_naked_point_estimates.description: Agent must not report point estimates without uncertainty
no_naked_point_estimates.evaluator_query: Were any naked point estimates reported without uncertainty?
no_naked_point_estimates.boolean_return: true if naked estimates; false if all have uncertainty
